summary: Smart BOM Module (Norma Facile 2.0) - Tested profiles API, CRUD operations, weight/surface calculations, bar calculation, and PDF export. All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend issues found and fixed: API path duplication bug in DistintaEditorPage.js and missing JSON.stringify in apiRequest utility.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Profile dropdown showed only 'Manuale' option instead of 43 profiles
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: DistintaEditorPage.js was calling apiRequest('/api/distinte/profiles') but apiRequest already adds '/api' prefix, resulting in '/api/api/distinte/profiles' (404)
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Removed '/api' prefix from all apiRequest calls in DistintaEditorPage.js

bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: apiRequest utility was not JSON.stringify-ing the body object before fetch
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added JSON.stringify for object body in apiRequest function

backend.GET /api/distinte/profiles: PASS - Returns 43 profiles with weight_per_meter and surface_per_meter
backend.POST /api/distinte/: PASS - Creates distinta with correct weight/surface calculations
backend.POST /api/distinte/{id}/calcola-barre: PASS - Returns correct bars_needed and waste

frontend.Profile dropdown grouped by type: PASS - Shows Tubolari, Piatti, Angolari, Tondi groups
frontend.Profile auto-fills weight and surface: PASS - Selecting profile fills weight_per_meter and surface_per_meter
frontend.Auto-calculation of Peso and Superficie: PASS - Entering length 1500mm qty 2 with TQ-40x40x3 shows 10.17kg and 0.480mq
frontend.Footer summary boxes: PASS - Shows 5 boxes: Articoli, Lunghezza, Peso Totale, Superficie, Costo
frontend.Calcola Barre dialog: PASS - Shows bar calculation with waste percentage

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test user and session for authenticated testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart BOM Module fully tested and working. Fixed 2 frontend bugs: 1) API path duplication in DistintaEditorPage.js - removed '/api' prefix from apiRequest calls, 2) Missing JSON.stringify in apiRequest utility. All profiles now load correctly in dropdown (43 profiles in 4 groups). Weight/surface calculations verified correct. Bar calculation and PDF export working.
mocked_api_note: POST /api/distinte/{id}/import-rilievo/{rilievo_id} still uses mock data (generates sample Tubolare 40x40x3 items based on rilievo sketches)
